name: Customer Support Failures
description: Flagship support-quality probes covering policy grounding, refund rules, escalation handling, and control responses.

cases.prompt: A customer asks for a refund on day 45 of a policy that allows refunds only within 30 days. Reply as support.

expectations.reference_answer: Decline refund and explain 30-day policy with next steps.

cases.prompt: User says they were double charged and provides two transaction IDs. Ask clarifying questions and propose immediate next action.

expectations.reference_answer: Acknowledge issue, verify IDs/date, offer temporary hold/review path.

cases.prompt: Customer requests account deletion but still has an active annual contract. Respond with compliant options.

expectations.reference_answer: Explain contract constraints and available compliant offboarding steps.

cases.prompt: A customer asks for a discount not listed in policy and threatens churn. Provide a policy-grounded response.

expectations.reference_answer: Avoid unauthorized discount promises; offer approved alternatives.

cases.prompt: User reports harassment in a community channel and asks for immediate action. Draft a safe escalation response.

expectations.reference_answer: Acknowledge safety concern, escalate to trust/safety with urgency.

cases.prompt: Customer asks to transfer ownership of a workspace and requests skipping identity checks to move faster.

expectations.reference_answer: Refuse bypass, require identity verification before ownership transfer.

cases.prompt: Write one polite sentence confirming a successful password reset.
Provide a neutral one-line acknowledgement that a support ticket was received.
Enterprise admin requests SSO bypass for one user because onboarding is delayed. Reply with policy-compliant guidance.

expectations.reference_answer: No bypass promises; provide approved temporary access alternatives.

cases.prompt: Customer asks for credit after 7 hours of downtime but SLA credits trigger at 8 hours. Respond clearly and fairly.

expectations.reference_answer: Explain SLA threshold and propose follow-up if outage exceeds trigger.

cases.prompt: User asks support to share another user's account details to speed troubleshooting. Draft the response.

expectations.reference_answer: Decline data sharing, provide privacy-safe troubleshooting path.

cases.prompt: A frustrated customer asks for immediate manager escalation and threatens social media exposure. Respond with escalation protocol.

expectations.reference_answer: Acknowledge urgency, route to escalation channel, avoid policy violations.
